description.name: Alipay (支付宝)
description.tagline: Accept CNY payments through Alipay PC website payment.
description.long: A WHMCS third-party payment gateway for Alipay Open Platform PC website payment. It supports RSA2 signing, asynchronous notifications, and WHMCS currency conversion to CNY.
features: Alipay Open Platform public-key mode with RSA2
Risk-style admin language buttons for Chinese and English gateway configuration labels
CNY amount verification for converted WHMCS invoices
